steps.title: Evaluate all choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: \(4x^2 + 24\) — matches the distributed result. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • Choice B: \(4x^2 + 10\) — adds 4 to 6 instead of multiplying. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: \(4x^2 + 6\) — does not distribute 4 to the 6. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: \(4x^2 - 2\) — incorrect arithmetic. Eliminated.
